zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul IV de Vexin於大約1020年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯可雷時，他的父親Raoul III de Vexin41歲，母親Adelaide de Breteuil29歲。他於1043年與Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil在法國o-阿爾培斯o瓦盧斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1074年9月8日在法國皮卡迪索姆培洛享年55歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul IV de Vexin于大约1020年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯可雷时，他的父亲Raoul III de Vexin41岁，母亲Adelaide de Breteuil29岁。他于1043年与Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil在法国o-阿爾培斯o瓦盧斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1074年9月8日在法国皮卡迪索姆培洛享年55岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Vane
meanings: variant of   Fayne   with southern English voicing of initial [f] to [v].

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul IV de Vexin was born about 1020, in Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Raoul III de Vexin, was 41 and his mother, Adelaide de Breteuil, was 29. He married Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil in 1043, in Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 September 1074, in Péronne, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul IV de Vexin est né environ 1020, à Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Raoul III de Vexin, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Breteuil, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil en 1043, à Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1074, à Péronne, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul IV de Vexin um 1020 in Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul III de Vexin 41 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Breteuil 29. Er hat 1043 in Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1074 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul IV de Vexin è nato il circa 1020 nel Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul III de Vexin, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Breteuil, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil nel 1043, nel Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1074, nel Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul IV de Vexinが約1020年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeプイで生まれた時，父Raoul III de Vexinは41歳，母Adelaide de Breteuilは29歳であった。1043年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンヴァロイスでAdèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1074年9月8日にフランスピカーディソンメプeロンで55歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメモントディディエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul IV de Vexin(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크ep이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul III de Vexin(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Breteuil(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1043년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 발이스에서 Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1074년 9월 8일 프랑스 피카디 솜 pe론에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜 몽디디어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul IV de Vexin nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Raoul III de Vexin, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Breteuil, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil em 1043, em Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1074, em Péronne, Somme, Picardie, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul IV de Vexin родился около 1020 г. в местности крeпи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul III de Vexin было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Breteuil, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil в 1043 г. в местности валоис, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 сентября 1074 г. в местности пeронн, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности монтдидиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul IV de Vexin nació aproximadamente 1020, en Crépy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Raoul III de Vexin, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Breteuil, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil en 1043, en Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1074, en Péronne, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
